clusters.justification: These terms co-activate across salience and limbic pathways to govern broad manifestations of physiological arousal, emotional valence, and generalized internal states.
These terms reflect computations within mesolimbic and frontostriatal circuitries underlying reinforcement learning, motivational drives, and subjective value-based action selection.

Anchored primarily in default mode network activity, these terms coordinate internally directed thought, self-referential processing, and the representation of psychological states in oneself and others.
